evals.name: feature-request
evals.prompt: I want to add a dark mode toggle to my React app. Users have been asking for it because it reduces eye strain at night.
evals.expected_output: Creates requirement.md with type: feature, user story, acceptance criteria, and proper folder naming
assertions: User story section exists with 'As a... I want... so that...' format
Acceptance criteria section exists with checkboxes

evals.name: bug-report
evals.prompt: The login button doesn't work on mobile. When I tap it, nothing happens. It works fine on desktop though.
evals.expected_output: Creates requirement.md with type: bug, reproduce steps, expected vs actual behavior
assertions: Reproduce steps section exists with numbered steps

evals.name: explore-request
evals.prompt: How does the current authentication flow work? I need to understand it before adding 2FA.
evals.expected_output: Creates requirement.md with type: explore, question, scope, timebox
assertions: Scope section with In Scope and Out of Scope
